nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard FitzRobert Lord of Cruelly was born in 1125, in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, was 35 and his mother, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, was 35. He had at least 1 daughter with Mathilde De Saint Clair. He died in 1175, in his hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard FitzRobert Lord of Cruelly est né en 1125, à Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, avait 35 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Mathilde De Saint Clair. Il est décédé en 1175, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard FitzRobert Lord of Cruelly 1125 in Gloucester, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester 35 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester 35. Er hatte mit Mathilde De Saint Clair mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1175 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard FitzRobert Lord of Cruelly è nato il nel 1125 nel Gloucester, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester, aveva 35 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Mathilde De Saint Clair. Morì nel 1175, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Richard FitzRobert Lord of Cruelly(이)가 1125년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 그루스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRoy Earl of Gloucester(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzRobert Countess of Gloucester(은)는 35세였다. 그는 Mathilde De Saint Clair(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1175년 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.
